episodes.title: How a Cult Won Democratic Elections
episodes.description:
Nazism was not just a political movement — it functioned like a cult.
Myth replaced reason. Ritual replaced debate. Belief replaced evidence.
This video shows how occult ideas, symbols, and mass ceremonies helped transform a democracy into the Third Reich — and why millions believed.

This video is strictly educational and based on historical research.

-----------------------

Timestamps: 

01:55 A Myth Before the Movement
07:49 A Nation Looking for Meaning
13:11 When Myth Learned to Speak Politics
16:37 The Prophet of the Movement
19:14 Politics Turned into Ritual

----------------------
